body.title: prim_turn_trace_read — Igor queries his own recent cloud calls from turn_traces table
body.result: prim_turn_trace_read() primitive tool implemented: reads recent turn traces from forensic logs, filters by cost_usd >= min_cost_usd (default 0.005), returns JSON list with input_preview, tier_used, cost_usd, bg_winner, created_at. Habit PRIM_TURN_TRACE_READ registered. Tests: 354/354 passing. Closes self-training loop — Igor can inspect own cloud calls.
body.description: Add prim_turn_trace_read() to wild_igor/igor/tools/os_primitives.py. Basket inputs: limit (default 10), min_cost_usd (default 0.005 to filter for real cloud calls). Queries turn_traces table: SELECT input_preview, parsed_intent, tier_used, cost_usd, bg_winner, created_at WHERE cost_usd >= min_cost_usd ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT limit. Returns JSON list. Register habit PRIM_TURN_TRACE_READ with code_ref. This closes the self-training loop — Igor can see his own cloud calls without Claude Code delegation.
